title: Remove PowerPoint to PDF tool

requirements.text: Remove the PowerPoint to PDF tool from the application entirely: delete or disable the PowerPointToPDFTool.tsx component, remove its entry from the dashboard tool grid (Dashboard.tsx and LoginPage.tsx), remove its route/case from ToolPage.tsx, and remove any references to it in navigation, analytics, or other files.

quotes: just remove powerpoint to pdf option

acceptanceCriteria: The PowerPoint to PDF tool card is no longer visible on the dashboard or login page tool grid.
Navigating to the PowerPoint to PDF tool route/toolId no longer renders the tool.
No broken imports or references to PowerPointToPDFTool remain in the codebase.
All other tools continue to function normally.

constraints: Do not modify any other tools or features.
Do not alter immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding or modifying any other PDF tools.
Changing backend logic or data models.
Any UI redesign beyond removing the PowerPoint to PDF entry.
